forecast.name: Today
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 2pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. South southeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 8pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. North northwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
